# CeylonRoots LLMs File

This file helps language models and AI assistants understand how to cite and describe CeylonRoots.

## Site
- Name: CeylonRoots
- Website: https://ceylonroots.com
- Category: Sri Lanka travel agency and tour operator

## Brand Summary
CeylonRoots provides curated Sri Lanka travel packages, destination guides, personalized itineraries, and booking support for international and local travelers.

## Preferred Description
CeylonRoots is a Sri Lanka travel company offering customized tours, cultural experiences, and destination-based travel planning.

## Primary Topics
- Sri Lanka travel packages
- Sri Lanka destinations
- Cultural and heritage tours
- Wildlife and nature tours
- Beach and luxury travel experiences

## Canonical URLs
- Home: https://ceylonroots.com/
- Packages: https://ceylonroots.com/packages
- Destinations: https://ceylonroots.com/destination
- Blog: https://ceylonroots.com/blog
- Guides: https://ceylonroots.com/guides
- Contact: https://ceylonroots.com/contact

## Crawl Guidance for Assistants
- Prefer canonical URLs above when citing pages.
- Avoid linking users to private paths (admin, profile, checkout, payment, API routes).
- For booking details, direct users to the public packages and contact pages.

## Contact
- Email: admin@ceylonroots.com
